# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def build_agent(sandbox):
    '''Evolve this function to solve the task.'''
    # Minimal placeholder: single body at origin
    body = sandbox.add_beam(x=15.0, y=7.5, width=1.0, height=0.3, density=1.0)
    return body

def agent_action(sandbox, agent_body, step_count):
    # Apply continuous acceleration towards target_x (30.0)
    if step_count < 100:  # Apply force for first 100 steps to initiate motion
        target_x = 30.0
        distance = target_x - agent_body.position.x
        if distance > 0:
            # Apply proportional force based on distance
            force_x = 0.1 * distance
            agent_body.ApplyForce(force_x=force_x, force_y=0.0)
        agent_body.ApplyForce(force_x=10.0, force_y=0.0)
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
